title: schoenus fluitans var. tenellus
intro: Schoenus fluitans var. tenellus, also known as slender bog-rush or slender glasswort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Schoenus fluitans var. tenellus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
